changeSet.author: Shruthi P

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM location_tag where name='Appointment Location';

changeSet.comment: Add Appointment Location Tag if not already added.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO location_tag (name, description, creator, date_created, uuid) VALUES ('Appointment Location', 'When a user user creates a appointment service and chooses a location, they may only choose one with this tag', 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UUID());

changeSet.author: Shruthi P

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM location_tag where name='Appointment Location';

changeSet.comment: Add Appointment Location Tag if not already added.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO location_tag (name, description, creator, date_created, uuid) VALUES ('Appointment Location', 'When a user user creates a appointment service and chooses a location, they may only choose one with this tag', 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, gen_random_uuid());

createTable.remarks: scheduled, checked in, started, completed, cancelled, missed - scheduled, walk in

changeSet.author: Santhosh, Maharjun
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE appointment_service ADD COLUMN color varchar(8) NULL AFTER duration_mins;

changeSet.author: Santhosh, Maharjun
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE appointment_service ADD COLUMN color varchar(8) NULL;

changeSet.author: Kaustav

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduler_task_config WHERE name = 'Mark Appointment As Missed Or Complete Task';

changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO scheduler_task_config(name, description, schedulable_class, start_time, start_time_pattern, repeat_interval, start_on_startup, created_by, date_created, uuid) VALUES ('Mark Appointment As Missed Task', 'Mark appointments as missed task', 'org.openmrs.module.appointments.scheduler.tasks.MarkAppointmentAsMissedTask', CURRENT_DATE, 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss', 86400, TRUE, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UUID());
INSERT INTO scheduler_task_config(name, description, schedulable_class, start_time, start_time_pattern, repeat_interval, start_on_startup, created_by, date_created, uuid) VALUES ('Mark Appointment As Complete Task', 'Mark appointments as complete task', 'org.openmrs.module.appointments.scheduler.tasks.MarkAppointmentAsCompleteTask', CURRENT_DATE, 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss', 86400, TRUE, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UUID());

changeSet.author: Kaustav

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduler_task_config WHERE name = 'Mark Appointment As Missed Task';

changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO scheduler_task_config(name, description, schedulable_class, start_time, start_time_pattern, repeat_interval, start_on_startup, created_by, date_created, uuid) VALUES ('Mark Appointment As Missed Task', 'Mark appointments as missed task', 'org.openmrs.module.appointments.scheduler.tasks.MarkAppointmentAsMissedTask', CURRENT_DATE, 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss', 86400, TRUE, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, gen_random_uuid()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
INSERT INTO scheduler_task_config(name, description, schedulable_class, start_time, start_time_pattern, repeat_interval, start_on_startup, created_by, date_created, uuid) VALUES ('Mark Appointment As Complete Task', 'Mark appointments as complete task', 'org.openmrs.module.appointments.scheduler.tasks.MarkAppointmentAsCompleteTask', CURRENT_DATE, 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss', 86400, TRUE, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, gen_random_uuid()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: Bahmni

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduler_task_config WHERE name = 'Reminder of scheduled appointment';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO scheduler_task_config(name, description, schedulable_class, start_time, start_time_pattern, repeat_interval, start_on_startup, created_by, date_created, uuid) VALUES ('Reminder of scheduled appointment', 'Reminder of scheduled appointment', 'org.openmrs.module.appointments.scheduler.tasks.ReminderForAppointment', CURRENT_DATE, 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss', 3600, TRUE, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UUID());

changeSet.author: Bahmni

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scheduler_task_config WHERE name = 'Reminder of scheduled appointment';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO scheduler_task_config(name, description, schedulable_class, start_time, start_time_pattern, repeat_interval, start_on_startup, created_by, date_created, uuid) VALUES ('Reminder of scheduled appointment', 'Reminder of scheduled appointment', 'org.openmrs.module.appointments.scheduler.tasks.ReminderForAppointment', CURRENT_DATE, 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss', 3600, TRUE, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, gen_random_uuid());

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO privilege (privilege, description, uuid) VALUES ('Manage Appointments', 'Able to manage Appointments in Appointments module', gen_random_uuid());

changeSet.author: Maharjun, Shireesha

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.pastAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Adding query to fetch past appointments for patient
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO global_property (property, property_value, description, uuid) VALUES ('bahmni.sqlGet.pastAppointments','SELECT app_service.name AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_KEY, app_service_type.name AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_TYPE_KEY, DATE_FORMAT(start_date_time, "%d/%m/%Y") AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_DATE_KEY, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(start_date_time, "%l:%i %p"), " - ", DATE_FORMAT(end_date_time, "%l:%i %p")) AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SLOT_KEY, CONCAT(pn.given_name, " ", pn.family_name) AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_PROVIDER_KEY, pa.status AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_STATUS_KEY FROM patient_appointment pa JOIN person p ON p.person_id = pa.patient_id AND pa.voided IS FALSE JOIN appointment_service app_service ON app_service.appointment_service_id = pa.appointment_service_id AND app_service.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN patient_appointment_provider pap on pa.patient_appointment_id = pap.patient_appointment_id AND (pap.voided=0 OR pap.voided IS NULL) LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.provider_id = pap.provider_id AND prov.retired IS FALSE LEFT JOIN person_name pn ON pn.person_id = prov.person_id AND pn.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN appointment_service_type app_service_type ON app_service_type.appointment_service_type_id = pa.appointment_service_type_id WHERE p.uuid = ${patientUuid} AND start_date_time < CURRENT_DATE AND (app_service_type.voided IS FALSE OR app_service_type.voided IS NULL) ORDER BY start_date_time DESC LIMIT 5;' , 'Past appointments for patient', UUID());

changeSet.author: Maharjun, Shireesha

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.pastAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Adding query to fetch past appointments for patient
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO global_property (property, property_value, description, uuid) VALUES ('bahmni.sqlGet.pastAppointments','SELECT app_service.name AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_KEY, app_service_type.name AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_TYPE_KEY, DATE_FORMAT(start_date_time, "%d/%m/%Y") AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_DATE_KEY, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(start_date_time, "%l:%i %p"), " - ", DATE_FORMAT(end_date_time, "%l:%i %p")) AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SLOT_KEY, CONCAT(pn.given_name, " ", pn.family_name) AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_PROVIDER_KEY, pa.status AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_STATUS_KEY FROM patient_appointment pa JOIN person p ON p.person_id = pa.patient_id AND pa.voided IS FALSE JOIN appointment_service app_service ON app_service.appointment_service_id = pa.appointment_service_id AND app_service.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN patient_appointment_provider pap on pa.patient_appointment_id = pap.patient_appointment_id AND (pap.voided=0 OR pap.voided IS NULL) LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.provider_id = pap.provider_id AND prov.retired IS FALSE LEFT JOIN person_name pn ON pn.person_id = prov.person_id AND pn.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN appointment_service_type app_service_type ON app_service_type.appointment_service_type_id = pa.appointment_service_type_id WHERE p.uuid = ${patientUuid} AND start_date_time < CURRENT_DATE AND (app_service_type.voided IS FALSE OR app_service_type.voided IS NULL) ORDER BY start_date_time DESC LIMIT 5;' , 'Past appointments for patient', gen_random_uuid());

changeSet.author: Himabindu

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.pastAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Updating query to fetch past appointments for patient

changeSet.author: Bahmni

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.pastAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Updating query to fetch past appointments for patient

changeSet.author: Maharjun, Shireesha

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.upComingAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Adding query to fetch upcoming appointments for patient
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO global_property (property, property_value, description, uuid) VALUES ('bahmni.sqlGet.upComingAppointments', 'SELECT app_service.name AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_KEY, app_service_type.name AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_TYPE_KEY, DATE_FORMAT(start_date_time, "%d/%m/%Y") AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_DATE_KEY, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(start_date_time, "%l:%i %p"), " - ", DATE_FORMAT(end_date_time, "%l:%i %p")) AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SLOT_KEY, CONCAT(pn.given_name, " ", pn.family_name) AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_PROVIDER_KEY, pa.status AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_STATUS_KEY FROM patient_appointment pa JOIN person p ON p.person_id = pa.patient_id AND pa.voided IS FALSE JOIN appointment_service app_service ON app_service.appointment_service_id = pa.appointment_service_id AND app_service.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN patient_appointment_provider pap on pa.patient_appointment_id = pap.patient_appointment_id AND (pap.voided=0 OR pap.voided IS NULL) LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.provider_id = pap.provider_id AND prov.retired IS FALSE LEFT JOIN person_name pn ON pn.person_id = prov.person_id AND pn.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN appointment_service_type app_service_type ON app_service_type.appointment_service_type_id = pa.appointment_service_type_id WHERE p.uuid = ${patientUuid} AND start_date_time >= CURRENT_DATE AND (app_service_type.voided IS FALSE OR app_service_type.voided IS NULL) ORDER BY start_date_time ASC;' , 'Upcoming appointments for patient', UUID());

changeSet.author: Maharjun, Shireesha

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.upComingAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Adding query to fetch upcoming appointments for patient
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO global_property (property, property_value, description, uuid) VALUES ('bahmni.sqlGet.upComingAppointments', 'SELECT app_service.name AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_KEY, app_service_type.name AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SERVICE_TYPE_KEY, DATE_FORMAT(start_date_time, "%d/%m/%Y") AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_DATE_KEY, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(start_date_time, "%l:%i %p"), " - ", DATE_FORMAT(end_date_time, "%l:%i %p")) AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_SLOT_KEY, CONCAT(pn.given_name, " ", pn.family_name) AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_PROVIDER_KEY, pa.status AS DASHBOARD_APPOINTMENTS_STATUS_KEY FROM patient_appointment pa JOIN person p ON p.person_id = pa.patient_id AND pa.voided IS FALSE JOIN appointment_service app_service ON app_service.appointment_service_id = pa.appointment_service_id AND app_service.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN patient_appointment_provider pap on pa.patient_appointment_id = pap.patient_appointment_id AND (pap.voided=0 OR pap.voided IS NULL) LEFT JOIN provider prov ON prov.provider_id = pap.provider_id AND prov.retired IS FALSE LEFT JOIN person_name pn ON pn.person_id = prov.person_id AND pn.voided IS FALSE LEFT JOIN appointment_service_type app_service_type ON app_service_type.appointment_service_type_id = pa.appointment_service_type_id WHERE p.uuid = ${patientUuid} AND start_date_time >= CURRENT_DATE AND (app_service_type.voided IS FALSE OR app_service_type.voided IS NULL) ORDER BY start_date_time ASC;' , 'Upcoming appointments for patient', gen_random_uuid());

changeSet.author: Shankar, Mahesh

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.upComingAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Updating query to fetch upcoming appointments for patient

changeSet.author: Bahmni

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.sqlGet.upComingAppointments'

changeSet.comment: Updating query to fetch upcoming appointments for patient

changeSet.author: nidan

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM provider_attribute_type WHERE name = 'Available for appointments';

changeSet.comment: Remove corrupted row so correct insert can run

changeSet.author: Maharjun, Saikumar

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM provider_attribute_type where name='Available for appointments';

changeSet.comment: Adding provider attribute type for Appointments
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO provider_attribute_type (name, description, datatype, min_occurs, creator, date_created, retired, uuid) VALUES ('Available for appointments','providers will be available for appointments', 'org.openmrs.customdatatype.datatype.BooleanDatatype', 0, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0, UUID());

changeSet.author: Maharjun, Saikumar

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM provider_attribute_type where name='Available for appointments';

changeSet.comment: Adding provider attribute type for Appointments

column.name: description
column.value: providers will be available for appointments

changeSet.author: Suman

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_property where property = 'atomfeed.publish.eventsForAppointmentService';

changeSet.comment: Adding global property to act as switch for raising appointment service events

column.name: description
column.value: If set true, events related to appointment service changes are published

changeSet.author: Suman

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_property where property = 'atomfeed.event.urlPatternForAppointmentService';

changeSet.comment: Adding global property to specify the URL pattern for published appointment service events

column.name: description
column.value: URL pattern to use for published appointment service events. Default is /openmrs/ws/rest/v1/appointment-services/{uuid}. If you change default value, please add your custom implementation for the given URL

changeSet.author: Suman

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_property where property = 'atomfeed.publish.eventsForAppointments';

changeSet.comment: Adding global property to act as switch for raising appointment events

column.name: description
column.value: If set true, events related to appointment changes are published

changeSet.author: Suman

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_property where property = 'atomfeed.event.urlPatternForAppointments';

changeSet.comment: Adding global property to specify the URL pattern for published appointment events

column.name: description
column.value: URL pattern to use for published appointment events. Default is /openmrs/ws/rest/v1/appointments/{uuid}. If you change default value, please add your custom implementation for the given URL

changeSet.author: angshu
changeSet.comment: Migrating appointment provider to appointment_provider table

changeSet.author: angshu
changeSet.comment: Migrating appointment provider to appointment_provider table

changeSet.author: Saikumar, Neha

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM privilege WHERE privilege = 'Manage Own Appointments';

changeSet.comment: Add Manage Own Appointments privilege to manage own appointments only.

column.name: description
column.value: With this privilege, providers can book/edit appointments only for themselves.

changeSet.author: Saikumar, Sowmika

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM privilege WHERE privilege = 'Reset Appointment Status';

changeSet.comment: Add Reset Appointment Status privilege to reset appointments from any status to scheduled.

column.name: description
column.value: With this privilege, users can reset appointments from any status to scheduled.

changeSet.author: Dubey

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from global_property where property='bahmni.appointments.runningOnOpenMRS'

changeSet.comment: Adding 'bahmni.appointments.runningOnOpenMRS' global property to figure out instance type

column.name: description
column.value: If set to yes, the appointments ui will run independent of bahmni core

changeSet.author: Sukreet

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM privilege WHERE privilege = 'Appointments: Invite Providers';

changeSet.comment: Add Schedule Appointments privilege to manage own appointments only.

column.name: description
column.value: With this privilege, providers can invite others to an appointment

changeSet.author: Sowmika, Bindu

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM global_property where property = 'atomfeed.event.urlPatternForRecurringAppointments';

changeSet.comment: Adding global property to specify the URL pattern for published appointment events

column.name: description
column.value: URL pattern to use for published Recurring appointment events. Default is /openmrs/ws/rest/v1/recurring-appointments?uuid={uuid}. If you change default value, please add your custom implementation for the given URL

changeSet.author: Deedee Lee

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person_attribute_type where name = 'email';

changeSet.comment: Add email address in registration page
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO person_attribute_type (name, description, format, searchable, creator, date_created, retired, uuid) VALUES ('email', 'Email Address', 'java.lang.String', '1', 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0, UUID());

changeSet.author: Deedee Lee

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person_attribute_type where name = 'email';

changeSet.comment: Add email address in registration page

changeSet.author: Nathan Ruhanga
changeSet.comment: Enforcing BOOLEAN datatype for boolean fields

changeSet.author: Nathan Ruhanga
changeSet.comment: Enforcing BOOLEAN datatype for boolean fields

changeSet.author: Kavitha, Umair
changeSet.comment: Update start and end date time of patient appointment table to be nullable
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE patient_appointment MODIFY start_date_time datetime default null; ALTER TABLE patient_appointment MODIFY end_date_time datetime default null;

changeSet.author: Kavitha, Umair
changeSet.comment: Update start and end date time of patient appointment table to be nullable

changeSet.author: mgoodrich
changeSet.comment: Add the map table to link appointments to fulfilling encounter

changeSet.author: aojwang
changeSet.comment: add a column to record the date an appointment was issued

changeSet.author: aojwang
changeSet.comment: Default the date an appointment was issued to the appointment date_created
changeSet.sql: UPDATE patient_appointment SET date_appointment_scheduled = date_created WHERE date_appointment_scheduled IS NULL;

changeSet.author: Mohan
changeSet.comment: Create table to store appointment reasons linked to concepts

changeSet.author: Bahmni
changeSet.comment: Creating appointment_service_attribute_type table

changeSet.author: Bahmni
changeSet.comment: Creating appointment_service_attribute table

changeSet.author: Srijan Ram, Kousalya
changeSet.comment: Adding index on appointment_number column to improve search performance
